summary: Implementation-only GR slice covering common ground helpers, animation helpers, material code, route files, push-on, and zako generator work. The PR reported several new matches and unmatched-item improvements, with explicit discussion of narrowly retained codegen crutches: a scoped global_optimizer-off pragma for Ground_801C5878 and Shrine Route unused locals kept because removal regressed local progress.

key_files.role: GR animation helper matching and cleanup; added helper boundaries, renamed locals, looped over JObj/DObj/MObj/PObj/RObj structures, and replaced temp/phi-style locals in excerpts.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grAnime_801C6C0C new 100% match and grAnime_801C7228/grAnime_801C7C1C improvements

key_files.role: Common ground helper work; contained reviewed pragma exception for Ground_801C5878 and reviewer request to prefer struct-based access in Ground_801C20E0.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: discussion_r3416233891 scoped pragma retained after 75.88% -> 75.77% regression
review_comments.md: discussion_r3418311489 asks whether pointer math can match with struct stuff
text_corpus: bot report lists Ground_801C5878 new 100% match and Ground_801C20E0 improvement

key_files.role: Big Blue route matching cleanup; excerpts show route update local ordering, Vec3 assignment cleanup, removal of volatile Vec3, PAD_STACK size adjustment, and bit access through an UnkFlagStruct cast.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grBigBlueRoute_8020CD20 improvement 92.65% -> 98.60%

key_files.role: Kinoko route matching improvements; changed-file and bot report evidence available, but detailed diff not loaded in full excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grKinokoRoute_80207C88, grKinokoRoute_80207634, grKinokoRoute_802078F0, and .sdata2 improvements

key_files.role: GR material matching improvements; file called out as reviewer focus and bot report lists one new match.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: reviewer focus files include grmaterial.c
text_corpus: bot report lists grMaterial_801C92C0 new 100% match and fn_801C8EF8 improvement

key_files.role: Push-on route/stage matching improvements; changed-file and bot report evidence available, detailed diff not loaded in excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grPushOn_80218888 and grPushOn_802190D0 improvements

key_files.role: Shrine route matching improvements; retained explicit unused locals in two functions after removal reduced local progress.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: cleanup note says unused locals in fn_80208A38 / grShrineRoute_8020AE08 were left because removal dropped 74.52% -> 74.49%
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_80208A38 new 100% match and multiple grShrineRoute improvements
text_corpus: bot report lists grZakoGenerator_801CACB8 and grZakoGenerator_801CAC14 improvements

what_changed: Changed eight files under src/melee/gr: granime.c, grbigblueroute.c, grkinokoroute.c, grmaterial.c, ground.c, grpushon.c, grshrineroute.c, and grzakogenerator.c.
PR body describes this as draft slice 3 of 14 from an aggregate WIP branch, scoped to common GR helpers and route-related files with no intended header/naming churn beyond implementation needs.
Bot report for the slice recorded four new 100% matches: grAnime_801C6C0C, Ground_801C5878, grMaterial_801C92C0, and fn_80208A38.
Bot report also recorded 16 improvements in unmatched items across grkinokoroute, grbigblueroute, grpushon, grshrineroute, grmaterial, ground, granime, and grzakogenerator.

granime.c excerpt replaced temp_rXX/phi-style locals with typed role names such as dobj, mobj, pobj, robj, child, child_robj, grandchild, anim_flags, aobjdesc, and robj, and introduced grAnime_801C7228_for_each_child as a static inline helper.

grbigblueroute.c excerpt removed volatile from Vec3 rot, adjusted PAD_STACK from 0x4C to 0x44, used direct Vec3 assignments, introduced a temporary t for repeated spline parameter use, and used an UnkFlagStruct cast for bit-field-like access to gp->gv.bigblue.x0.
ground.c retained a tightly scoped #pragma push / #pragma global_optimizer off / #pragma pop around Ground_801C5878 after author-reported removal caused a nonmatched regression.
ground.c Ground_801C20E0 hunk switched from LightOverrideEntry indexed struct access to byte-offset pointer access; reviewer asked whether it could match with struct stuff.
Shrine Route retained explicit unused locals in fn_80208A38 / grShrineRoute_8020AE08 because removal reportedly dropped local progress from 74.52% to 74.49%.

smart_moves.text: The author explicitly tried to remove local pragma/volatile crutches and documented which remaining crutches were retained because removal reduced matching progress.
The global_optimizer-off exception in ground.c was scoped narrowly with push/pop around only Ground_801C5878 and tied to a concrete reported regression when removed.

granime.c cleanup moved some generated-looking temp/phi variables toward local role names and factored child traversal into a named static inline helper, improving reviewability while matching improved.
grbigblueroute.c replaced repeated component-wise Vec3 copies with whole-struct Vec3 assignment where the diff shows the source shape allowed it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlueRoute_8020CD20 rot = orient / rot = road_rot hunks

decomp_lessons.lesson: Before retaining pragmas, volatile locals, PAD_STACK, or explicit unused locals, try removing them and record the exact match/progress effect if they must stay.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: cleanup pass note removed local pragma/volatile crutches and left Shrine Route unused locals after 74.52% -> 74.49%
review_comments.md: discussion_r3416233891 Ground_801C5878 pragma removal caused 75.88% -> 75.77%

decomp_lessons.lesson: A pragma exception is more reviewable when it is tightly scoped and has concrete regression evidence, but it should remain an exception rather than normal source style.
Reviewer feedback favored struct-based access over byte-offset pointer arithmetic in Ground_801C20E0 when a plausible struct shape exists.
For traversal-heavy animation helpers, typed local role names and helper extraction can make decompiled control flow easier to review than temp_rXX/phi-style variables.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C7228 hunk replacing temp_r20/temp_r4/phi_* with dobj/mobj/pobj/robj/child names and helper extraction

naming_conventions.name: anim_flags
naming_conventions.meaning: Semantic replacement for var_r29 in grAnime_801C7C1C, used as accumulated animation flag bits passed to grAnime_801C752C.

naming_conventions.name: dobj, mobj, pobj, robj, child, child_robj, grandchild
naming_conventions.meaning: Short local role names for HSD object traversal in granime.c.

naming_conventions.name: aobjdesc
naming_conventions.meaning: Temporary local for aj->aobjdesc before HSD_AObjLoadDesc in grAnime_801C7C1C.

naming_conventions.name: road_rot
naming_conventions.meaning: Vec3 local in grBigBlueRoute_8020CD20 that stores road rotation before assigning it to rot.

naming_conventions.name: t
naming_conventions.meaning: Temporary spline parameter reused for calls in grBigBlueRoute_8020CD20.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlueRoute_8020CD20 spline point / tangent hunks

assembly_or_matching_tactics.evidence: Author reported removing the guard regressed Ground_801C5878 from 75.88% to 75.77%; review comment says it is tightly scoped with push/pop and PR checks were green.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Pragma use is an exceptional codegen tactic and should not generalize without adjacent-function evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retained explicit unused locals in fn_80208A38 / grShrineRoute_8020AE08.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.evidence: Author said removal reduced local progress from 74.52% matched to 74.49% matched across two functions.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Dummy or unused locals are codegen crutches; keep narrow and revisit when source shape is better understood.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK size tuning remains in grBigBlueRoute_8020CD20 after volatile Vec3 rot removal.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.evidence: Diff excerpt changes volatile Vec3 rot to Vec3 rot and PAD_STACK(0x4C) to PAD_STACK(0x44).
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: PAD_STACK requires verifier evidence; the loaded excerpt shows the edit but not standalone objdiff proof for the exact stack padding.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Helper extraction/static inline boundary in grAnime_801C7228_for_each_child.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.evidence: Diff factors child and grandchild traversal out of grAnime_801C7228 while bot report records grAnime_801C7228 improvement.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Inline/helper boundaries should remain tied to local match evidence; excerpt does not include a detailed objdiff explanation for why this boundary was chosen.

review_feedback.feedback: Author flagged concern about the global_optimizer-off pragma.
review_feedback.resolution_or_response: Author later documented that removing it caused a nonmatched regression in Ground_801C5878; ribbanya commented, 'Yeah, weird. Let's keep it for now.'

review_feedback.feedback: jurrejelle asked whether Ground_801C20E0 could match with struct stuff instead of byte-offset pointer arithmetic.
review_feedback.resolution_or_response: Loaded evidence does not show a final code resolution for this specific comment.

follow_up_queries: Ground_801C20E0 LightOverrideEntry struct byte_off pointer math
Ground_801C5878 global_optimizer off pragma push pop

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed files, review counts
human_pr_text.md: PR body and issue comments
notes: Evidence is strong for PR identity, changed files, high-level scope, bot-reported match/progress deltas, and ground.c review feedback.

Diff evidence is truncated; detailed edits in grkinokoroute.c, grmaterial.c, grpushon.c, grshrineroute.c, and grzakogenerator.c are mostly represented by changed-file metadata and bot report rather than full hunks.

The PR body initially says slice-specific CI/regression was in progress; later comments mention PR checks were green and keeping the pragma made the slice regression-free, but this intake does not independently validate builds or objdiff.
Reviewer intent beyond the literal comments is not inferred. The dismissed state of jurrejelle's review is recorded in text_corpus but not treated as resolving the struct-access concern.
Some tactics, such as PAD_STACK size and static inline helper extraction, are visible in diff excerpts but lack detailed standalone author explanation in the loaded evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Scoped pragma exceptions need explicit regression evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2706 retained #pragma global_optimizer off only around Ground_801C5878 after the author reported removal regressed the nonmatched item from 75.88% to 75.77%; reviewer follow-up accepted keeping it for now. Treat as a narrow exception, not general style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Reviewer preferred struct-backed access over byte-offset access in Ground_801C20E0
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2706, a Ground_801C20E0 hunk changed LightOverrideEntry-style indexing to byte-offset pointer access; reviewer jurrejelle asked whether it could match with struct stuff. This is useful evidence for revisiting typed access in this function.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Document retained unused locals or other crutches with match deltas
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2706 documents that explicit Shrine Route unused locals in fn_80208A38 / grShrineRoute_8020AE08 were tried for removal but kept because removal dropped local progress from 74.52% to 74.49%.

source_update_candidates.title: Pragma exceptions should cite exact regression deltas and tight scope
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding PR #2706 as an example under avoid-pragmas-register-asm / matching-tactics-need-evidence: a #pragma global_optimizer off guard was kept only around Ground_801C5878 after removal reportedly regressed the nonmatched item from 75.88% to 75.77%, with push/pop scoping and reviewer acceptance to keep it for now.
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded evidence gives a concrete, bounded historical example matching the existing standard, but curator should decide whether to add it as a standards example.

source_update_candidates.title: ground.c Ground_801C20E0 has unresolved typed-access review concern
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2706 reviewer asked whether the Ground_801C20E0 LightOverrideEntry/light override loop could match with struct stuff after a byte-offset pointer-math edit. This may be useful as a path-scoped hint for future ground.c cleanup.
source_update_candidates.reason: The comment is concrete and path-specific, but the loaded slice does not show whether it was resolved.

source_update_candidates.title: ground.c Ground_801C5878 retained a narrow global_optimizer-off guard
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2706 retained a scoped #pragma global_optimizer off around Ground_801C5878 because removing it reportedly regressed the nonmatched item from 75.88% to 75.77%; reviewer comment said to keep it for now.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful future-maintenance warning for this function; should remain a path fact candidate rather than a global endorsement of pragmas.

source_update_candidates.title: grshrineroute.c unused locals retained after local progress regression
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2706 author tried removing explicit unused locals in fn_80208A38 / grShrineRoute_8020AE08 but kept them because local progress dropped from 74.52% to 74.49%.
source_update_candidates.reason: Path-specific historical context may prevent accidental cleanup regressions, but curator should verify against current source before adding.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the retained ground.c pragma into a normal accepted style; the PR evidence frames it as concerning, weird, and kept for now because of a concrete regression.
Do not claim all route files were fully matched; the bot report shows a mix of new matches and partial unmatched-item improvements.
Do not treat the Ground_801C20E0 byte-offset pointer access as accepted style; reviewer explicitly questioned whether struct-backed access could match.
Do not infer detailed lessons for grkinokoroute.c, grpushon.c, grmaterial.c, grshrineroute.c, or grzakogenerator.c beyond reported match improvements unless full diff/source evidence is inspected.
